title: Pick Me Crop
description: Shows an alert on top of harvestable crops!
body:
PICK ME CROP

...is a Minecraft quality-of-life resource pack that adds an hovering, animated red alert on top of crops when they're ready to harvest. That's it, no need to look closely at your potatoes. This pack applies to:
  • Wheat
  • Potatoes
  • Carrots
  • Beetroots
  • Melon Stems (attached)
  • Pumpkin Stems (attached)
  • Berry Bushes
  • Cocoa Beans
  • Nether Wart
  • COMING SOON: Torchflower
  • COMING SOON: Pitcher Plant
